data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for SLA breach detection.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to trigger detection when an SLA is breached. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the implementation of SLA definitions or breach detection mechanisms. The linked use case mentions the need for SLA definitions but lacks concrete evidence of their existence, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No explicit SLA definitions (arrival windows, max wait, completion windows) provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
